name: Unicron, the Chaos Bringer
oracle_text:
Indestructible
Whenever an artifact or land is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, ~ deals 2 damage to any target.
{T}, Sacrifice an Energon token: Destroy target land.
flavor_text: The end of all things is not a bang, but the grinding of gears and the cold silence of the void.

validation_errors: Oracle text is 382 characters, exceeding the 300-char limit for this card type

design_notes: Unicron is designed as the set's ultimate antagonist, a mythic-tier 'God' that embodies cosmic horror. To represent his planet-devouring nature, I gave him high stats (10/10) and Indestructible. His primary ability triggers off the destruction of artifacts and lands, which synergizes with the set's Energon mechanic and common artifact-based play, while rewarding him for the chaos he causes. The {T} ability allows players to spend their gathered Energon tokens to destroy lands, reflecting his role as a world-ender. His color identity (U/B/R) covers blue's control/artifact interaction, black's destruction and damage, and red's chaotic impact.
